purpose: Refresh operational infrastructure candidates for a scalable agent company: browser/computer-use workers, MCP/A2A gateways, AI gateways, durable cloud workers, and observability/control planes.
metadata_sources: Authenticated `gh repo view` reads for repository metadata.
Primary repository README/docs pages opened through browser search results.
Initial unauthenticated GitHub REST read was rate-limited and is not used as evidence.

repos.description: Make websites accessible for AI agents.
repos.local_decision: Reference browser worker UX, domain allowlists, persistent browser state, and recovery loop patterns; keep actual browser actions behind the browser_read_only_session and public_action gates.
repos.gate: browser_read_only_worker_policy plus signed approval before any browser session.

repos.description: A programming framework for agentic AI.
repos.local_decision: Keep as a conversational multi-agent reference, but do not migrate the local lane manager model to it now.
repos.gate: dependency install, model API, and runtime start approval required.

repos.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents.
repos.local_decision: Study as a possible fast local browser command surface; do not install Chrome or start browser processes.
repos.gate: browser install/start remains blocked until explicit browser worker approval.

repos.local_decision: Reference desktop sandbox/benchmark boundaries for future local worker pools; do not activate VM/container workers.
repos.gate: sandbox execution gate plus worker-pool registration approval required.

repos.description: AI Agent Framework, the Pydantic way.
repos.local_decision: Reference typed outputs, evals, and durable agent semantics; keep local validation schemas as authority for now.
repos.gate: model API, dependency install, and runtime start approval required.

repos.description: Human-in-the-loop control for coding agents in complex codebases.
repos.local_decision: Reference approval UX and decision routing for coding-agent work; do not connect to messaging or public channels.
repos.gate: public-action and secrets gates required before any integration.

repos.description: Framework for building realtime voice AI agents.
repos.local_decision: Park as future voice/operator surface reference; not needed for the current money-path control plane.
repos.gate: model, audio, network, privacy, and runtime gates required.

repos.description: AI Agent Engineering Platform built on an Open Source TypeScript AI Agent Framework.
repos.local_decision: Reference production observability dashboards, traces, logs, and agent performance metrics for Atlas/CEO views.
repos.gate: no SaaS console, dependency install, or telemetry export without approval.

repos.description: AI-native proxy and data plane for agentic apps.
repos.local_decision: Reference LLM routing, safety, observability, and policy data-plane concepts for the local egress ledger.
repos.gate: no proxy/runtime start; all model traffic remains blocked by model_api_execution_gate.

repos.description: All-in-One Sandbox for AI Agents combining Browser, Shell, File, MCP, and VSCode Server.
repos.local_decision: Reference unified workspace isolation and file/browser/shell/MCP boundaries; do not start Docker/container workers.
repos.gate: sandbox execution, MCP registry, secrets, and worker activation gates required.

repos.description: Build and deploy AI Agents on Cloudflare.
repos.local_decision: Reference durable objects, scheduling, MCP, workflows, approvals, and browser agents as future deployment patterns.
repos.gate: cloud account, billing, deployment, and runtime gates required.

repos.description: AI Gateway, registry, and proxy for MCP, A2A, and REST/gRPC APIs.
repos.local_decision: Reference tool registry, plugin, observability, and gateway federation design for the local service catalog.
repos.gate: MCP tool registry gate and no live tool calls until approval.

repos.description: Next Generation Agentic Proxy for AI Agents and MCP servers.
repos.local_decision: Reference unified LLM/MCP/A2A gateway policy, RBAC, spend control, and observability patterns.
repos.gate: no gateway process, Kubernetes, model traffic, or tool traffic without signed operator approval.

repos.description: Quickstarts and samples for durable AI agents using Microsoft Agent Framework.
repos.local_decision: Reference the Durable Task extension shape for future workflow integration, not as a direct dependency.
repos.gate: Azure account, billing, deployment, and runtime gates required.

primary_source_takeaways.title: agentgateway README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: Agentgateway combines LLM, MCP, and A2A gateway roles with security, spend controls, RBAC, rate limits, and OpenTelemetry.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Unify the local model/API, MCP, and agent-to-agent egress ledgers before any live gateway is adopted.

primary_source_takeaways.title: Cloudflare Agents README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: The package set includes state, scheduling, MCP, workflows, approvals, browser agents, email, and resumable streaming.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Use this as a reference for a future deployment shape after local checkpoint/resume packets and approval gates mature.

primary_source_takeaways.title: Browser Use README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: Browser Use 0.13 adds a Rust-core beta agent with browser harness, persistent tools, and recovery loops.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Treat browser workers as stateful, policy-bound workers with domain allowlists and explicit session lifecycle records.

primary_source_takeaways.title: CUA README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: CUA focuses on sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks for agents controlling full desktops across operating systems.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Separate desktop/computer-use worker pools from browser-only workers and require sandbox execution preflight.

primary_source_takeaways.title: IBM ContextForge README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: ContextForge federates MCP, A2A, REST, and gRPC APIs with centralized governance, discovery, observability, plugins, auth, retries, and tracing.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Extend the local service catalog toward a registry/proxy model while preserving deny-by-default tool calls.

primary_source_takeaways.title: Vercel Agent Browser README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: Agent Browser is a native Rust browser automation CLI for AI agents.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Useful as a command-surface pattern, but browser install/start must remain gated.

primary_source_takeaways.title: AIO Sandbox README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: AIO Sandbox combines browser, shell, file, MCP, and VSCode Server in one Docker environment with unified filesystem and multiple interfaces.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Future worker sandboxes need capability-scoped identity envelopes and per-channel egress records.

primary_source_takeaways.title: VoltAgent README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: VoltOps emphasizes production observability with execution traces, performance metrics, visual dashboards, and logs.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Promote trace_events/outcomes/artifacts into richer CEO/Atlas health and replay views.

primary_source_takeaways.title: Pydantic AI README
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: Pydantic AI lists durable execution for progress preservation across API failures, app errors, restarts, and HITL workflows.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Keep typed local validators as the boundary before model-backed or durable runtime adapters.

primary_source_takeaways.title: Azure durable agents samples
primary_source_takeaways.takeaway: The sample repo organizes durable AI agent quickstarts and full apps around Microsoft Agent Framework plus Durable Task.
primary_source_takeaways.local_mapping: Use as a durable-agent sample reference only; Azure deployment and billing are gated.
